title: Create test vector framework
description: Set up test/vectors/ with JSON schema for test vectors. Create initial vectors for: link layer frames, SCHC compression. Both Rust and C implementations must validate against these vectors.
close_reason: test/vectors/ framework created: schema.json (draft-07), schc_compression.json (rules 0-4 whole-packet), link_frame.json (4 frame cases), generate.py (regenerator from the Python reference impl), README.md (how Rust/C validate). python/tests/test_vectors.py re-derives every vector (runs in CI) so the impl can't drift; 11 checks. Rust/C will validate against these same files when built.
